name: Sub Urban
description: '''Daniel Virgil Maisonneuve''' (born October 22, 1999), known professionally as '''Sub Urban''', is an American [[singer-songwriter]] and producer. Born in [[Nyack, New York]] and raised in [[Ridgewood, New Jersey]], he started producing and writing songs at fifteen. He initially rose to prominence with his hit single "[[Cradles (song)|Cradles]]", which gained virality on [[TikTok]].
